home.badge: The Arabic reference for archery & equestrian
home.heroSubtitle: The platform for archery, horseback archery and equestrian — your reference for tournaments, rankings, training and certificates.
home.sportsSub: Three authentic sports, one integrated system
home.featuredTournamentsSub: Register, track your results and ranking

why.rankingDesc: Instant local, governorate, country and international rankings after every tournament.
why.certDesc: Electronic certificates and a digital QR membership card for every athlete.
why.coursesDesc: Professional courses from certified coaches with quizzes and completion certificates.
why.multiDesc: Full Arabic/English interface with light & dark mode and an installable app.

home.ctaBannerSub: Create your account and begin your journey in archery and equestrian.
home.heroArtTitle: The art of archery, the spirit of the knight.
home.heroArtEn: The art of precision. The spirit of the knight.
home.heroArtPara: From the banks of the Nile and the heritage of knights, we host ground and horseback archery competitions, alongside the elite Black Knight tier — with precise standards and official 60×60 cm targets.
home.catSub: From static discipline to speed on horseback, up to the elite challenge.
home.groundDesc: Static precision across six certified distances. From learning the basics to mastering long range.
home.hbaDesc: Balance under speed. A test of harmony between knight and horse, loosing arrows in motion.
home.blackDesc: The elite tier. Combines long-range ground mastery with horseback challenges. By invitation only.
home.distSub: Six stages that progress with the competitor from beginnings to legend.
home.specPara: A square target 60 cm on each side, high-density straw core with a water- and heat-resistant face, certified for all competition distances from 10m to 100m.
home.journeyTitle: Begin your journey as a knight
home.journeyEn: Draw the bow. Begin the journey.

sports.equestrianDesc: Horse riding, jumping, dressage and endurance skills.
sports.archeryDesc: Target accuracy and the arts of archery across distances — on foot and on horseback.
sports.black_knightDesc: The elite tier combining long-range ground mastery and horseback archery — by invitation only.

auth.loginTagline: Log in to follow your tournaments and ranking
auth.registerTagline: Join the Knights of the Nile community
auth.coachApprovalNote: You'll appear under the coach once they approve you.
auth.pending: Your account is under review. You will be notified once approved.
auth.awaitingCoachNote: Your account is created and you can browse the platform. Your dashboard will appear once your coach approves you.
auth.athleteNote: Your account starts as an athlete. After approval you can request an upgrade to coach or judge from your dashboard.

footer.tagline: The Arabic and global reference for archery, horseback archery and equestrian.

about.title: Egyptian equestrian heritage in archery
about.lead: Knight of the Nile is an Arabic and global platform for archery, horseback archery and equestrian, uniting athletes, coaches, judges and clubs in one integrated system for tournaments, rankings and training.
about.mission: To be the official reference for tournaments, training and rankings across governorates and countries, reviving Egyptian equestrian heritage with modern world standards.
about.vision: A platform connecting the Knights of the Nile to the world: certified tournaments, automatic ranking, digital certificates and professional courses — in Arabic and English.
about.v1: Precise standards and official 60×60 cm targets for all distances.
about.v2: Inspired by Egyptian equestrian heritage and the knight's spirit.
about.v3: Transparent judging, certified results and neutral automatic ranking.
about.v4: Clubs, coaches and athletes from many governorates and countries.
about.ctaTitle: Join the Knights of the Nile
about.ctaSub: Create your account and begin your journey.

contact.title: Begin your journey as a knight
contact.sub: For any question about tournaments, joining or partnerships, write to us and we'll get back to you.
